title: jasione humilis subsp. amethystina
intro: Jasione humilis subsp. amethystina is a subspecies of the Jasione humilis plant, commonly known as the small, woody, perennial, or biennial herb that grows in rocky and mountainous regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasione humilis subsp. amethystina include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in herbal supplements, to utilize its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
